identity.name: Aslanbaş Oto - The Asphalt Suite
identity.description: A high-performance mobile-first CRM for car dealers. Dark mode default to evoke showroom luxury and reduce glare. High contrast for outdoor legibility.

usage.label: font-heading font-bold text-sm tracking-widest uppercase text-muted-foreground

semantics.brand_primary: The 'Lion Gold' - Used for key actions (Add, Save) and active states.
semantics.brand_background: Deep Asphalt/Gunmetal - evokes premium automotive paint.
semantics.status_error: Brake Light Red - Expenses, Delete, Overdue.

custom_components.name: VehicleCard
custom_components.description: Card with top image, details below. Badges for status. Price prominent.

custom_components.name: StatCard
custom_components.description: Simple card with Label, Big Number, and Trend Indicator.

custom_components.name: BottomNav
custom_components.description: Fixed bottom navigation for mobile with 4-5 items.

custom_components.name: Fab
custom_components.description: Floating Action Button for primary add actions on mobile.

styling_rules.buttons: rounded-full font-bold uppercase tracking-wider shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all active:scale-95
styling_rules.cards: border border-border/50 shadow-sm hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors bg-card

visual_enhancers.gradients: Use subtle radial gradients in backgrounds (e.g., bg-[radial-gradient(ellipse_at_top,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-slate-900 to-slate-950)
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-md for BottomNav and Sticky Headers. bg-background/80
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-lg for floating elements, shadow-sm for cards.
visual_enhancers.textures: Optional: subtle noise texture overlay on the main background for 'asphalt' feel.

images.strategy: Use high-quality car placeholders until user uploads. Dark environments preferred.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Update /app/frontend/src/index.css with the provided HSL values for both light and dark themes.
2. Add the Google Fonts import to index.css or index.html.
3. Update tailwind.config.js to include 'font-heading' and 'font-body' families.
4. Create a Layout component that includes a Mobile BottomNav (visible on small screens) and a Sidebar (visible on large screens).
5. Use the 'Lion Gold' (primary color) sparingly for CTAs to maintain luxury feel.
7. For the Inventory List, use a Card layout on mobile and a Table layout on desktop (responsive design).
8. Implement a 'Dark Mode Toggle' in the Settings, but default to Dark.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Use glass-morphism for overlays and sticky headers.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical for a 'luxury' feel.
NEVER use transparent backgrounds for dropdowns/popovers.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid.
